title: ESTHER'S PANTRY - 211info
text: ESTHER'S PANTRY ESTHER'S PANTRY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a shopping-style food pantry, pet food, and personal care items that are available once a month. People without an HIV diagnosis may be eligible to receive a one-time food box of pantry staple items. Accepts donations of shelf-stable food, pet food, toilet paper, and personal care items. 10202 SE 32nd Avenue Suite 601 Milwaukie, OR 97222 Eligibility: Individuals diagnosed with HIV who have a monthly income below 185% of the Federal Poverty Level Hours: Monday 1pm-4pm, Tuesday/Thursday 2pm-5pm, Wednesday 1pm-3pm Email (503) 349-4699 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 349-4699 Main phone (503) 652-4455 FAX Main phone (503) 349-4699 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Pantry: Call or visit website for more information Donations: Visit website for needs and location and hours of collection sites FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of diagnosis from physician, proof of income AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Columbia, Multnomah, Washington, and Yamhill Counties SITE HOURS: Monday 1pm-4pm, Tuesday/Thursday 2pm-5pm Services: Animal Food/Supplies Donation Programs Food Donation Programs Food Pantries * AIDS/HIV Personal/Grooming Supplies * AIDS/HIV Personal/Grooming Supplies Donation Programs Pet Food * AIDS/HIV If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
